title: drymochloa drymeja subsp. exaltata
intro: Drymochloa drymeja subsp. exaltata, also known as the drymochloa drymeja exaltata plant, is a plant species native to New Caledonia. It belongs to the family of grasses and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, making it a valuable source of health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
